title: thlaspidium arvense
intro: Thlaspidium arvense, also known as Thlaspi arvense, is a type of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, commonly referred to as field pennycress. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Thlaspi arvense include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other infections. Thlaspi arvense is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be found in herbal supplements and tinctures.
